summary: Comprehensive testing of Service Contract Management System with public form access workflow. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified admin dashboard, form creation with client info, public form access without login, 6-step wizard navigation, save draft, form submission, language switching (Arabic RTL/English LTR), and admin viewing submitted forms.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was returning 500 error due to legacy data without client_info field. Added filter to only return forms with client_info.

critical_code_review_comments: Public form access workflow is well-implemented - clients can fill forms without login using access_token
Admin form creation modal correctly captures client info (name, company, email, phone)
Form link modal displays shareable URL after form creation
6-step wizard navigation works correctly with Previous/Next buttons
Save Draft functionality persists form data without submission
Form submission requires declaration agreement (good validation)
RTL/LTR layout switching works correctly for Arabic/English
Admin can view submitted forms in read-only modal
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_ prefixed application forms for testing. Existing test form with access_token: 4131b846-c6bc-41c9-aa7b-732e1d8e0fc5
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Admin login/dashboard - PASS, 2) Admin 'إنشاء طلب اعتماد جديد' button opens modal - PASS, 3) Admin enters client info (name, company, email, phone) - PASS, 4) Form created and link modal shown - PASS, 5) Copy link to clipboard - PASS, 6) Public form page loads with client info - PASS, 7) 6-step wizard displayed - PASS, 8) Client fills form without login - PASS, 9) Save draft works - PASS, 10) Form submission works - PASS, 11) Success message shown - PASS, 12) Admin dashboard shows submitted form - PASS, 13) RTL layout works - PASS, 14) Language switching works - PASS. Email sending is MOCKED (logs to console).

mocked_integrations.email_sending: MOCKED - Email sending logs to console instead of sending real emails (SMTP not configured)
